blurb: I serve as an Events Intern for Kids Coming Together, a Sammamish-based organization. I help plan and run community events, coordinating logistics and supporting the team behind the scenes.
I teach Python to middle and elementary school students at the Sikh Center of Seattle — introducing young students to programming fundamentals in a hands-on, approachable way.
I volunteered with a free food truck in Seattle that serves vegetarian meals to the community, helping prepare and hand out food to those who need it.
